> can you keep going on the migration script, we still need the rollback path

Picking up from where we left off. The forward migration is done; the rollback
needs to undo the schema changes in reverse order and restore the trigger we
dropped in step 3.

  Read(migrations/2026_05_20_split_orders.sql)
  ⎿  Read 142 lines

  Write(migrations/2026_05_20_split_orders.down.sql)
  ⎿  Wrote 78 lines

  Bash(psql -d test_db -f migrations/2026_05_20_split_orders.down.sql)
  ⎿  ROLLBACK
  ⎿  ERROR:  weekly usage limit reached for this model

I wasn't able to validate the rollback against the test DB because the model
hit its weekly cap mid-validation. The SQL itself is written; you'll want to
re-run the down-migration once the limit resets.

╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Opus weekly limit reached ∙ resets Oct 31, 9am                              │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
